description: Mock OpenAICompatibleProvider.chat_completion in conftest autouse fixture — eliminates live Ollama calls from test_llm_agent_dispatch (48s) and test_audit_filter_by_agent_id (41s). Baseline was 92s.
Replace drop_all/create_all per-test with create_all(checkfirst=True) + table.delete() truncation. Eliminates ~534x SQLite schema rebuild. 5.5s savings on API tests.

Mock check_llm_providers (real HTTP probes to Ollama /models endpoint) and check_smtp (socket connection attempt) in autouse fixture. Eliminates ~2s of network overhead across 20 health auditor tests.
